pi_items.source: Task instructions and verifier.py require this exact field name.
setup_task.sh injects logs containing IDs generated with the format 'TXN-######'.
setup_task.sh injects the target logs using the 'logger -t FinCore' command.

privileged_info_summary: The environment synthetically generates logs with the app name 'FinCore'. These logs contain transaction IDs formatted as 'TXN-######' (e.g., TXN-123456). The agent is instructed to create a custom field named 'FinTransactionID' to extract these IDs.
